title: Rebel Cell - Outer Rim, Just Before Yavin
startLocation: Docking Bay 7, Kella Spaceport, Parnassos Sector
opening: The freighter 'Lucky Hand' squats in Docking Bay 7 with her engine cowling open like a patient mid-surgery, and Captain Vess is arguing with the fuel droid about credits the cell doesn't have. Word came through the holonet relay an hour ago, double-encrypted: an Imperial convoy is staging two systems over, hauling something heavy under a Star Destroyer escort, and High Command wants eyes on it. Stormtrooper patrols have doubled in the spaceport since yesterday. Brix the astromech rolls up to you, screeching softly: there's a checkpoint forming at the bay doors, and your forged dock passes expired this morning.

squad.name: Capt. Mara Vess
squad.trait: ex-Imperial cadet, flies like she's still being graded

squad.name: Tobin Reek
squad.trait: teenage code prodigy, allergic to plans

squad.name: Korr
squad.trait: gentle giant, owes Vess a life debt, hates droids in the cockpit

squad.name: Brix (R4-B9)
squad.trait: pessimistic, keeps secret odds on everyone's survival

squad.name: Sergeant Dax Onorr
squad.trait: old, steady, trains the cell like recruits and feeds them like family

timelinePressure: 1977-05-04 Imperial convoy reaches the staging point - whatever it carries moves to the Core
1977-05-12 Regional Moff begins sector-wide crackdown; informers paid double
1977-05-25 Rumors spread of a Rebel victory at Yavin - hope, and Imperial fury, ignite together
1977-06-10 The cell's safe house rotation expires; a new haven must be earned
